items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of tax-exemption support where applicable, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data related to tax-exemption policies or their application. The prior steps focus on booking and financial outputs without addressing the necessary tax-exemption support, leading to an inconclusive result. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed as required.
